speaker: Diederich
text: Oh, Argo? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Hello, Argo.……

speaker: Argo
text: What’s this? I didn't expect to see you here, Professor Celio. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Really? I come here sometimes to discuss the curriculum, you know. *

speaker: Argo
text: Oh, I see. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: "Celio brought some fancy tea, so we're havin' a drink together." *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Well, it was given to me as a gift. Would you like a cup too, Argo? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Are you sure? Sounds good! *

speaker: Unknown
text: When I catch the scent of the tea being poured from the pot, I can certainly tell there’s something more elegant about it from ordinary tea.

speaker: Argo
text: “I’m guessing… this is really good!”

speaker: Diederich
text: Yeah, and I’m guessin’… it’s better than other kinds of tea. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: There’s nothing to guess. Can’t you just say it’s delicious? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: "Sorry, I'm a coffee drinker, so I wasn’t sure."

speaker: Argo
text: 'I’ve got an unsophisticated palate...'

speaker: Celio
text: Perhaps I should have shared this with someone else...

speaker: Argo
text: Ahaha...

speaker: Argo
text: What about with Theo? I bet he’d appreciate it. *

speaker: Celio
text: True. I’ll ask him next time. *

speaker: Diederich
text: Oh? That’s awfully forward for Mr. "Gotta-Keep-My-Distance-From-My-Students".

speaker: Celio
text: I want to learn about his E.P... It was finally awakened, right?

speaker: Diederich
text: Ah, I see. You’re just bein' an E.P. nerd. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: "E.P. nerd"...? Isn't it part of a professor’s job to keep track of his students’ E.P.s? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Yeah, yeah. Whatever you say. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: "I... I don't know what to say." *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Does Theo have a rare type of E.P.?

speaker: Celio
text: Kinds that can interfere with the fabric of space are not particularly rare.

speaker: Celio
text: Though it is a bit out of the ordinary for someone to suddenly appear on an unknown island...

speaker: Diederich
text: Someone who’s good at teleportin’ is extremely useful. I'm sure he’ll be in high demand once he becomes a knight. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Wow...

speaker: Celio
text: I can’t wait to see the other students' E.P.s.

speaker: Diederich
text: See? You’re totally an E.P. nerd. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Please stop calling me that!

speaker: Argo
text: "I don't understand why you’re so upset." *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: By the way... About Paul's E.P……

speaker: Diederich
text: Oh... Did he tell you about it? *paw prints*

speaker: Argo
text: It’s more like I accidentally found out…

speaker: Celio
text: Ah, yes. You two are sharing a room, aren’t you?

speaker: Argo
text: He told me you let him be a student again…

speaker: Celio
text: That’s right. I felt awful for him…

speaker: Argo
text: It’s terrible how he died when it awakened...

speaker: Diederich
text: An E.P. ain’t always good for the user.

speaker: Argo
text: Isn’t there anything you can do for him? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Hmm... There have been a few reports of similar E.P.s in the past. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: However... They have all ended in death... *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: But... *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: As your professors, we will do all we can to help, but this may be out of our hands… *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "Don’t… don't look at me like that." *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: ...That’s why you gotta make whatever time he’s got left special, Argo. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: That way he’ll at least enjoy his life here at the college.

speaker: Argo
text: ...I will. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: You two really do seem awfully close. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: You think so? Our personalities don’t match at all, though. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: “We’re like water and oil, ya know?”

speaker: Argo
text: But you don’t seem like you hate each other, either. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Well, that’s because we’re adults. We must be willing to get along with all kinds of people. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Are you kiddin'? I don’t even give people the time o' day if I don’t like ‘em! *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: "I... I don't know what to say." *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: In that sense, you’re more mature than him, Argo.

speaker: Diederich
text: Huh? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What? I-I’m… mature?

speaker: Celio
text: Well, you made an effort to interact with Prince Theo even though you knew he hated you, right? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: I think that is a wonderful attitude to have.

speaker: Argo
text: Uh... That's just because it was normal to get along with everyone back in my village...

speaker: Argo
text: I just wanted to be friends with him... I never thought it was a particularly mature thing to do…

speaker: Celio
text: To me, that is what makes you more mature than Professor Derich.

speaker: Diederich
text: Aw, gimme a break already! *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: You think I’m plenty grown-up and cool, right, Argo? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Uh... Y-Yeah...

speaker: Argo
text: (I’m not so sure about that “cool” part…) *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: But you know what? I always thought people like you who come from unusual places are a good influence on the other students.

speaker: Celio
text: Yes... This may be an elite school, but we can’t expect big changes if we only ever get the same kinds of students.

speaker: Celio
text: It was a wise decision to have you enroll, Argo.

speaker: Argo
text: Well... You know... Hehehe.

speaker: Diederich
text: “I’m proud to have you as my student. Ain't no one else like you.”

speaker: Celio
text: "He’s not your only student… Please don’t play favorites."

speaker: Diederich
text: “I know, I know.”

speaker: Celio
text: Do you really...? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "I... I don't know what to say." *sigh*
And so I spent my day off having tea with the professors.
Getting to hear what they think made my day quite interesting. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: It’s always just Professor Derich and I when come here, so it’s a little strange to see you here too. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Oh... You come here often?

speaker: Argo
text: Yeah! I usually join him for breakfast. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Professor Derich... *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: What’s with that look!? There's nothin' wrong with havin' breakfast together! *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: No, there isn't, but...

speaker: Diederich
text: “Hey, don’t be so hard on me! He’s my favorite!”

speaker: Celio
text: Favorite...? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: As long as you remember to act as his professor, I'll allow it...

speaker: Diederich
text: Ugh... Y-Yeah, yeah. Of course I will. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: What was that "ugh" for just now...? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Nothin'! Right, Argo!? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Y-Yeah.

speaker: Celio
text: "I... I don't know what to say." *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Hmph... I think it’s about time I returned to my room.

speaker: Celio
text: Would you like to come with me, Argo? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Oì, he just got here! Give ‘em some time to relax!

speaker: Argo
text: “I’ll I’ll stay here…” *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: “I… I don’t know what to say.” *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: ...Professor Derich? Remember what I said. Act as his professor.... *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Yeah, yeah, I know!

speaker: Celio
text: "Haah... See you later, Argo."

speaker: Argo
text: Bye, Professor Celio.

speaker: Diederich
text: ...God damn. Took 'em long enough to shut up and leave. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Don’t say that. He just takes his job very seriously. *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: I wish he’d be more relaxed like me. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (You’re too relaxed…)

speaker: Diederich
text: "Anyways, I’m in the mood for coffee now. You want some too?"

speaker: Argo
text: Sure. Thanks!

speaker: Professor Derich
text: I really enjoy having coffee with Professor Derich like this. I hope Professor Celio will overlook it…
